question: been running this aquaculture operation for 6 years, mostly salmon. consultant is pushing us to increase stocking density by about 40% to hit our growth targets - says the mortality rates are still within industry standards and the financials would finally work. what factors should i be weighing here

we run a small hotel and our guests keep asking about local horseback riding excursions - theres this outfit that does 3 hour trail rides through the canyon, really popular on tripadvisor. they want us to book directly with them instead of going through the tour companies, says we'd get better commission rates. worth setting up a partnership

my research lab just got approval for this cosmetics ingredient study but the animal care committee is asking us to use 200 mice instead of our original 300 sample size. statistically it might work but our industry partner is worried about the data not being robust enough for FDA submission, what should we prioritize
